name: Airtech Japan, Ltd.
summary: Airtech Japan, Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells clean air systems in Japan and internationally. The company offers clean rooms, air showers/pass boxes, clean booths/FFUs, clean benches/biosafety cabinets/isolators, infection control equipment and facilities, insect control facilities, cleanroom facilities, cleaning supplies, and dust and chemical dust removers/deodorizers. It offers its products for electronics/semiconductor/FPD industry, food manufacturers, pharmacies/cosmetic markets, universities/laboratories, hospitals, and regenerative medicine markets. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
